name: Hestia's Hearth
effect: If all 5 of your dice are odd or all 5 are even the hand gains +3 Favour.

name: Charon's Ferry Fare
effect: Gain +1 Gold after scoring any hand (does not trigger on a scratch).

name: Achilles' Heel
effect: All scores gain +10 Pips but you lose 1 Gold at the start of each roll

name: Midas Touch
effect: Gain +5 pips for every 10 Gold you have when scoring.

name: Icarus' Wings
effect: Each unused re-roll at the end of a turn gives +10 Pips to the score. Chance to break after turn 1 in 6

name: Lethe Waters
effect: All dice with a value of 2 or less are not counted for scoring but your final score gains +15 Pips.

name: Forge of Hephaestus
effect: Gain x0.5 Favour for each unused re-roll you have at the end of the turn (Max x1.5).

name: Prometheus' Gift
effect: Gives +3 Favour to all hands but you have one less re-roll each turn.

name: Chaos Primordial
effect: All Favour gains are doubled but Pips are randomized (1-40).

name: Mt Olympus
effect: Gain +1 Favour for each Worship card you have used this run.

name: Parmenides Die
effect: Scores swap between upper and lower pantheon.

flavor: Burnt in temples sipped by scribes.
